absorb_workflow.source: sz absorb draft plus deterministic protocol adapter

behaviors: read recent System Zero bus events
append normalized events to a daily module-private JSONL chronicle
maintain a deterministic hash-chain head for tamper evidence
public_purpose: Records recent bus events into a hashed daily chronicle stream.
reconstruction: Protocol-native behavior was re-derived from the source candidate and hardened into an anonymized System Zero module.
source_summary: keywords: logging, forensics, events, hash-chain, tamper-detection, observability, self-recursive
